title: Rulemaking
doc_html:
§1310.12. Rulemaking

            The Louisiana State Board of Medical Examiners shall adopt rules and regulations for the administration of this Part as are necessary for the adequate protection of the health and welfare of the citizens of this state.

            Acts 2022, No. 757, §1.
doc_text:
§1310.12.  Rulemaking
The Louisiana State Board of Medical Examiners shall adopt rules and regulations
for the administration of this Part as are necessary for the adequate protection of the health
and welfare of the citizens of this state.
Acts 2022, No. 757, §1.
